questionHtml: State the reason for performing the experiment in the months of May to August.
markschemeHtml:
because nymphs are present/numbers of nymphs rise «in these months»
OR
build up immunity/antibodies in mice before nymphs «peak» ✔

Ignore references to larvae.

meta.title: State the reason for performing the experiment in the months of May to August.
breadcrumbLabels: C3.2.7. Antigens as recognition molecules that trigger antibody production
